name_en: Stone Five-Storied Pagoda
description_en: A stone five-storied pagoda classified as a tangible cultural property (structure). Municipally designated by Akita City on 1962-04-09. Located at Yabase Honcho 6-chome.

name_romaji: Shinnami Jinja Honden no Koshigumi Zaiku Kiso Kenchiku
name_en: Bracket-Complex Base Structure of the Main Hall of Shinnami Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property (structure), the bracket-complex base construction of the main hall of Shinnami Shrine. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1988-09-06. Located at Yūwa Shinnami, Higuchi.

name_en: Omonogashira Guardhouse
description_en: A tangible cultural property (structure), a former guardhouse. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1990-04-10. Located in Senshu Park.

name_en: Sanctuary of Akita Holy Saviour Church
description_en: A tangible cultural property (structure), the sanctuary of a church. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1990-04-10. Located at Hodono Nakamachi.

name_en: Main Gate of Hodaji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property (structure), the temple gate of Hodaji. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1994-03-04. Located at Sannai, Tanaka.

name_en: Former Kaneko Family Residence
description_en: A tangible cultural property (structure), a former residence of the Kaneko family. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1997-10-22. Located at Ōmachi 1-chome.

name_en: Main Hall of Hodaji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property (structure), the main hall of Hodaji Temple. Municipally designated by Akita City on 2001-03-02. Located at Sannai, Tanaka.

name_en: Shrine Pavilion of Fujikura Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property (structure), the shrine pavilion of Fujikura Shrine. Municipally designated by Akita City on 2011-03-03. Located at Sannai, Fujikura.

name_en: Painting of Amida and the Twenty-Five Bodhisattvas Descending
description_en: A tangible cultural property (painting) depicting the descent of Amida and twenty-five bodhisattvas. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1963-02-26.

name_en: Painting of the Thirteen Buddhas
description_en: A tangible cultural property (painting) of the Thirteen Buddhas. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1964-04-03.

name_en: Painting of Amida Nyorai Descending
description_en: A tangible cultural property (painting) of Amida Nyorai in descent. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1965-04-12.

name_romaji: Shō Kanzeon Bosatsu-zō Satake Yoshimasa Hitsu
name_en: Image of Sacred Kannon Bodhisattva, by Satake Yoshimasa
description_en: A tangible cultural property (painting) of the Sacred Kannon Bodhisattva, attributed to Satake Yoshimasa. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1968-03-26.

name_romaji: Kenpon Chakushoku Nehan-zu Kanō Sadanobu Hitsu
name_en: Colored Silk Nirvana Painting, by Kano Sadanobu
description_en: A tangible cultural property (painting), a colored-on-silk Nirvana image attributed to Kano Sadanobu. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1970-03-31.

name_en: Light-Colored Paper Painting of Hanshan and Shide
description_en: A tangible cultural property (painting), a light-colored work on paper depicting Hanshan and Shide. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1970-03-31.

name_en: "Ink Landscape" by Satake Yoshimasa
description_en: A tangible cultural property (painting), an ink landscape attributed to Satake Yoshimasa. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1971-04-04. Held at the Satake Historical Materials Museum, Senshu Park.

name_romaji: Shihon Suiboku Daruma-zō Satake Yoshiatsu Hitsu
name_en: Ink Painting of Daruma on Paper, by Satake Yoshiatsu
description_en: A tangible cultural property (painting), an ink image of Daruma on paper attributed to Satake Yoshiatsu. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1972-01-05.

name_romaji: Satake Yoshibumi Hitsu "Sōroku" to "Taka to Washi"
name_en: "Two Deer" and "Hawk and Eagle" by Satake Yoshibumi
description_en: A tangible cultural property (painting), works titled "Two Deer" and "Hawk and Eagle" attributed to Satake Yoshibumi. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1972-04-26.

name_en: Musashino Folding Screen
description_en: A tangible cultural property (painting), a folding screen depicting Musashino. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1973-03-14.

name_en: Ancient Tales Folding Screen
description_en: A tangible cultural property (painting), a folding screen depicting ancient tales. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1973-03-14.

name_romaji: Kenpon Chakushoku Kachō-zu Sasaki Genzen Hitsu
name_en: Colored Silk Flower-and-Bird Painting, by Sasaki Genzen
description_en: A tangible cultural property (painting), a colored-on-silk flower-and-bird image attributed to Sasaki Genzen. Municipally designated by Akita City on 2003-03-18. Held at the Senshu Art Museum, Nakadori 2-chome.

name_en: Illustrated Biography of Saint Shinran
description_en: A tangible cultural property (painting), an illustrated biography of Saint Shinran. Municipally designated by Akita City on 2008-03-25.

name_romaji: Kenpon Chakushoku Ryōfu Hirafuku Hyakusui Hitsu
name_en: Colored Silk Painting of a Hunter, by Hirafuku Hyakusui
description_en: A tangible cultural property (painting), a colored-on-silk image of a hunter attributed to Hirafuku Hyakusui. Municipally designated by Akita City on 2009-02-26. Held at the Senshu Art Museum, Nakadori 2-chome.

name_romaji: Kenpon Chakushoku Iwa ni Shūkaidō to Kawazu-zu Odano Naotake Hitsu
name_en: Colored Silk Painting of Begonia and Frog on a Rock, by Odano Naotake
description_en: A tangible cultural property (painting), a colored-on-silk image of begonia and a frog on a rock attributed to Odano Naotake. Municipally designated by Akita City on 2012-03-01. Held at the Senshu Art Museum, Nakadori 2-chome.

name_en: Standing Bronze Statue of Amida Nyorai
description_en: A tangible cultural property (sculpture), a standing bronze statue of Amida Nyorai. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1962-04-09.

name_en: Noh and Kyogen Masks
description_en: A tangible cultural property (sculpture), a set of Noh and Kyogen masks. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1962-04-09.

description_en: A tangible cultural property (sculpture), a seated wooden statue of Manjushri Bodhisattva. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1963-02-26.

description_en: A tangible cultural property (sculpture), a standing bronze statue of the Eleven-Faced Kannon. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1967-03-30.

name_en: Seated Wooden Statue of Shaka Nyorai
description_en: A tangible cultural property (sculpture), a seated wooden statue of Shaka Nyorai. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1970-03-31.

name_en: Standing Wooden Statue of Ananda
description_en: A tangible cultural property (sculpture), a standing wooden statue of Ananda. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1970-03-31.

name_en: Standing Wooden Statue of Kasyapa
description_en: A tangible cultural property (sculpture), a standing wooden statue of Kasyapa. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1970-03-31.

name_en: Seated Wooden Statue of Akasagarbha Bodhisattva
description_en: A tangible cultural property (sculpture), a seated wooden statue of Akasagarbha Bodhisattva. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1971-03-17.

name_en: Seated Wooden Statue of Fudo Myoo
description_en: A tangible cultural property (sculpture), a seated wooden statue of Fudo Myoo. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1971-03-17.

name_en: Seated Wooden Statue of Kobo Daishi
description_en: A tangible cultural property (sculpture), a seated wooden statue of Kobo Daishi. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1971-03-17.

name_en: Statue of Hokushin Myoken
description_en: A tangible cultural property (sculpture), an image of Hokushin Myoken. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1971-04-04.

name_en: Hachiman in Monk's Form
description_en: A tangible cultural property (sculpture), an image of Hachiman in the form of a monk. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1971-04-04.

name_en: Seated Wooden Statue of Kannon Bodhisattva
description_en: A tangible cultural property (sculpture), a seated wooden statue of Kannon Bodhisattva. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1972-01-05.

name_en: Wrestler Carving of Shinnami Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property (sculpture), a wrestler figure of Shinnami Shrine. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1975-09-25.

name_en: Dragon Carving of Shinnami Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property (sculpture), a dragon carving of Shinnami Shrine. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1975-09-25.

name_en: Nio Guardian Statues of Tentokuji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property (sculpture), the Nio guardian statues of Tentokuji Temple. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1998-03-20.

name_en: Standing Statues of the Fudo Myoo Triad
description_en: A tangible cultural property (sculpture), standing statues of the Fudo Myoo triad. Municipally designated by Akita City on 2004-03-26.
